CVE-2021-3700.title: A use-after-free vulnerability was found in usbredir in versions  ...
CVE-2021-3700.description: A use-after-free vulnerability was found in usbredir in versions prior to 0.11.0 in the usbredirparser_serialize() in usbredirparser/usbredirparser.c. This issue occurs when serializing large amounts of buffered write data in the case of a slow or blocked destination.
